evidence_summary: Establish the group's profound exhaustion and disorientation within a massive, repetitive floral landscape. The scale of the scarlet buttercups and yellow daisies must dwarf the characters to emphasize their loss of direction and hope following the absence...

Dorothy, Scarecrow, Tin Woodman, Cowardly Lion, and Toto wander aimlessly through a vast, overwhelming field of scarlet buttercups and yellow daisies. Without the Yellow Brick Road to guide them, they are lost and losing hope.
The group moves with purpose but visible fatigue through dense flowers.
The group wanders aimlessly, showing signs of despair and physical depletion.
Wandering aimlessly through the vast flower fields without guidance.
